title: Sunday Mass Schedule Update
description: Sunday masses are held at 6:00 AM, 8:00 AM, 10:00 AM, 12:00 NN, and 6:00 PM. All parishioners are welcome.
author: Parish Office

title: Simbang Gabi 2025
description: Join us for the traditional 9-day novena masses starting December 16. Mass at 4:30 AM daily.
author: Fr. Jose Maria Santos

title: Parish Youth Ministry Monthly Meeting
description: Monthly meeting for all youth ministry members. Venue: Parish Hall, 3:00 PM.
author: Youth Ministry

title: Baptism Schedule — January 2025
description: Baptisms are held every second Sunday of the month at 1:00 PM. Register at the parish office.
author: Parish Office

title: Lenten Recollection 2025
description: A day of prayer and reflection for the Lenten season. Open to all parishioners. 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.
author: Fr. Miguel dela Cruz

title: Choir Auditions Open
description: The parish choir is looking for new members. Auditions every Saturday at 3:00 PM in the church.
author: Choir Ministry

title: Couples for Christ Household Meeting
description: All CFC household leaders are invited to the quarterly planning meeting at the Parish Hall.
author: Couples for Christ

title: Parish Fiesta — March 19
description: Celebrate the feast of Saint Joseph with a solemn High Mass at 9:00 AM followed by a parish lunch.
author: Parish Office
